setup.description: Interactive project setup — detects your project, configures metaswarm, writes project-local files

start-task.description: Begin tracked work on a task with complexity assessment

prime.description: Load relevant knowledge from the BEADS knowledge base before starting work

review-design.description: Architecture-focused design review (single architect-agent in this POC; full 5-agent gate not yet registered)

design-review-gate.description: Automatic review gate that runs after brainstorming completes - spawns PM, Architect, Designer, Security, and CTO agents in parallel

orchestrated-execution.description: 4-phase execution loop for work units - IMPLEMENT, VALIDATE, ADVERSARIAL REVIEW, COMMIT

issue-orchestrator.description: Main coordinator per issue — spawns sub-agents, runs 4-phase execution loop

architect-agent.description: Reviews technical architecture and creates implementation plans
